title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 56.090 - Must be present, when
text:
56.090.  Must be present, when. — No judge shall allow the cases alluded to in sections 56.060 and 56.080 to be tried before him, unless the prosecuting attorney or someone properly qualified to prosecute for him is present.  The judge, before trying these cases, shall give due notice to the prosecuting attorney.
(RSMo 1939 § 12946, A. 1949 H.B. 2014, A.L. 1959 S.B. 67, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11320; 1919 § 740; 1909 § 1010 
Effective 1-02-79
